reforms.description: The new renewable energy support scheme (METÁR) was introduced in 2017, combining feed-in tariffs, feed-in premiums, and competitive bidding procedures to stimulate investment in renewable energy projects.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The scheme encourages investment in renewable energy, which can lead to job creation and technological advancements in the energy sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The new renewable energy support scheme has been introduced.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of a comprehensive support scheme for renewable energy represents a significant policy shift aimed at enhancing investment in a crucial sector for sustainable development.
reforms.source_quote: The new renewable energy support scheme (METÁR) in 2017 has been introduced with a combination of feed-in tariffs, feed-in premiums and competitive bidding procedure.

reforms.description: In March 2018, the central bank launched its Innovation Hub to identify and address legal obstacles hindering the introduction and adoption of new financial technologies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating the adoption of financial technologies, the initiative aims to enhance efficiency and innovation in the financial sector, potentially leading to broader economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The central bank has launched its Innovation Hub.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the Innovation Hub represents a proactive approach to fostering innovation in the financial sector, addressing barriers to the adoption of new technologies.
reforms.source_quote: In March 2018, the central bank has launched its Innovation Hub to identify actually arising legal obstacles.

reforms.description: The government aims at promoting agglomeration effects through the 2016 'Modern Cities Program', which focuses on enhancing transport, education, cultural infrastructure, and industrial parks with around 300 projects planned.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving infrastructure, the program is expected to enhance local economic development and productivity, fostering a better environment for businesses and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The program encompasses numerous projects aimed at regional development.
reforms.importance_rationale: The program represents a significant investment in regional infrastructure, which is crucial for fostering economic growth and improving the business environment across multiple cities.
reforms.source_quote: The focus of the programme is on enhancing transport, education and cultural infrastructure as well as industrial parks, encompassing some 300 projects.

reforms.description: The establishment of Sectoral Skills Councils and a VET Innovation Council aims to improve skills acquisition in vocational education and training schools, particularly for Industry 4.0.
reforms.component_name: Sectoral Skills Councils and VET Innovation Council
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing skills acquisition aligns education with labor market needs, thereby improving employability and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: Recent measures to improve skills acquisition in VET schools include the establishment of Sectoral Skills Councils and a VET Innovation Council.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant step towards aligning vocational training with industry needs, which is crucial for regional economic development.
reforms.source_quote: Recent measures to improve skills acquisition in VET schools include the establishment of Sectoral Skills Councils and a VET Innovation Council (particularly for preparing skills formation for Industry 4.0).

reforms.description: The government is enhancing the role of tertiary education institutions in rural development by increasing their innovation and entrepreneurship activities and promoting cooperation with local businesses.
reforms.component_name: Enhancing Tertiary Education's Role in Rural Development
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering entrepreneurship and innovation in rural areas, this initiative can stimulate local economies and create jobs.
reforms.status_evidence: Tertiary education institutions can also play a larger role in rural development.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to bridge the gap between education and local economic needs, enhancing the entrepreneurial ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: Tertiary education institutions can also play a larger role in rural development.

reforms.description: The government is promoting the development of short supply chains in agriculture by encouraging the production of quality agricultural products through labelling initiatives.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing knowledge transfer and market access for local producers can lead to increased productivity and economic growth in the agricultural sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is promoting the development of short supply chains.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to improve agricultural productivity and market access, which is crucial for rural economic development.
reforms.source_quote: Support development of short-supply chains by promoting (through labelling) the production of quality agriculture products.
